skills.name: Create Issue
skills.description: Create a new GitHub issue in the current repository
skills.task: Click 'Issues' tab, then click 'New issue' button, fill the title with '${title}', fill the description with '${description}', then click 'Submit new issue'

skills.name: Create Pull Request
skills.description: Create a new pull request from current branch
skills.task: Click 'Pull requests' tab, click 'New pull request', set the title to '${title}', fill description with '${description}', then click 'Create pull request'

skills.name: Star Repository
skills.task: Find and click the 'Star' button on the repository page

skills.name: Fork Repository
skills.description: Fork the current repository to your account
skills.task: Find and click the 'Fork' button, then click 'Create fork' in the dialog

skills.name: Search in Repository
skills.description: Search for code or text in the current repository
skills.task: Press '/' or click the search box, type '${query}' and press Enter to search in this repository

skills.name: Close Issue
skills.task: Scroll to the bottom of the issue, find and click 'Close issue' button
